title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.520 - Custody of prisoner between return and judgment
text:
532.520.  Custody of prisoner between return and judgment. — Until judgment be given upon the return, the court before whom the party shall be brought may either commit such party to the custody of the sheriff of the county in which the proceedings are had, or place him in such care or custody as his age or other circumstances may require.
(RSMo 1939 § 1634, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1470; 1919 § 1920; 1909 § 2485 
Effective 1-02-79
